title: Irateq
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Company |image=[[File:BraveCage.png]] |name=Irateq
The Irateq RQ 550C ''Dart'' Podracer |founder= |ledby= |associations= |parent= |subsid= |headquarters= |locations= |role= |products=[[RQ 550C Dart|RQ 550C ''Dart'']][[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] |founding= |dissolved= |affiliation= }} '''Irateq''' was the manufacturer of the [[RQ 550C Dart|RQ 550C ''Dart'']] [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]]. The Podracer was known for its extreme agility and acceleration, though as a trade off, the vehicle was very fragile and could wreck easily. During the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] to the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. The racing season presented in the [[Star Wars video games|game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|Star Wars Episode I: Racer]]'' must have taken place during this year due to the appearances of [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]], and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], which correspond to ''The Phantom Menace''. the [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Navior|"Bullseye" Navior]] favored the Irateq ''Dart'' and used it extensively on [[Podracing/Legends|Podraces]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aquilaris]]. ==Behind the scenes== Irateq was first mentioned in the [[1999]]{{WebCite|url=http://www.ign.com/games/star-wars-episode-i-racer|text=Star Wars: Episode I: Racer - Nintendo 64 - IGN|work=[http://www.ign.com IGN]|archivedate=20161118045154}} [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|Star Wars Episode I: Racer]]'', acting as the name of the manufacturer for the RQ 550C Dart Podracer, though in-game, the vehicle was commonly referred to simply as the Irateq Dart. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] {{1stm}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer Official Nintendo Player's Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'' Official Nintendo Player's Guide]] *[[Stay on Target (sourcebook)|''Stay on Target'']] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Vehicle manufacturing companies]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Irateq products]] }}
